instrument: Meridian Core Equity Fund — Class A

sections.heading: Fees and Expenses of the Fund
sections.text: Maximum front-end sales load 5.75%. Management fee 0.65%. Distribution and/or service (12b-1) fees 0.25%. Other expenses 0.20%. Total annual fund operating expenses 1.10%. Fee waiver/expense reimbursement (0.10%) through 2027-01-31; net 1.00%.

sections.heading: Principal Investment Strategies
sections.text: The fund invests primarily in equity securities of large-capitalization U.S. companies the adviser believes are undervalued relative to fundamentals. Up to 20% may be held in foreign securities. Actively managed; does not seek to track an index.

sections.heading: Principal Risks
sections.text: You may lose money, including your entire principal. Principal risks include equity market risk, foreign investment risk, currency risk, and management risk. Shares are not bank deposits and are not FDIC-insured.

sections.heading: Buying and Selling Shares
sections.text: Shares may be purchased or redeemed on any business day the NYSE is open, at that day's net asset value if the request is received before the close. Redemption proceeds are normally paid within one to three business days. Redemptions may be suspended only as permitted by the 1940 Act.

sections.heading: Investor Eligibility and Minimums
sections.text: Minimum initial investment $1,000 ($500 for retirement accounts); minimum subsequent investment $100. Investors must provide identifying information under the USA PATRIOT Act. Shares are subject to the fund's frequent-trading policy.

sections.heading: Management of the Fund
sections.text: Investment adviser: Meridian Asset Management LLC. Lead portfolio manager has managed the fund since 2019.

sections.heading: Conflicts of Interest
sections.text: The adviser's asset-based fee creates an incentive to increase fund assets. Affiliated broker-dealers may execute portfolio transactions and receive commissions. Additional detail is in the Statement of Additional Information, incorporated by reference.
